claim: Second MCC measurement of the Layer 6 essentiality pipeline against Breuer 2019 labels. Run on a balanced 40-gene subset (20 Essential, 20 Nonessential) at scale=0.05, t_end=0.5s, with 10-gene noise-floor calibration and per-pool thresholds (safety_factor=2.5). Parallel: 4 workers, 4.9 s/gene effective wall. Result: MCC=0.160 (TP=1, FP=0, TN=20, FN=19). Specificity=1.00, but recall only 0.05 - the detector catches pgi (central glycolysis) but not ribosomal proteins, tRNA synthetases, transporters, or replication machinery because their knockouts don't produce detectable metabolite signatures within 0.5 s bio-time at 5 %% scale.
source_detail: Predictions: outputs/predictions_parallel_s0.05_t0.5_seed42_thr0.04_w4_cal10sf2.5.csv. Metrics JSON committed. Reproducible via 'python scripts/run_sweep_parallel.py --max-genes 40 --balanced --calibrate 10 --workers 4 --threshold 0.04 --safety-factor 2.5'.
caveats: Specificity is perfect (no false positives) but recall is only 0.05 - 19/20 essentials missed.

The missed essentials span ribosomal proteins (rpmI, rpsI, rpsN, rpsR, rpsE, rpsB...), ribonucleases (rnjB), glycolytic enzymes (tpiA), PTS components (crr), lipid biosynthesis (plsX), unknown transporters (ywjA).

Detector design only watches central-carbon + NTP + dNTP pools. Ribosomal / translation / replication signals are not monitored. Translational-stall signature via charged-tRNA-fraction is defined but not populated by RealSimulator because the existing FastEventSimulator doesn't expose charged tRNA pools as a named species.

Longer t_end (tried 2.0 s) did NOT improve recall - metabolic deviations saturate quickly at small scale. The fix is either (a) dramatically higher scale (e.g., full 1.0 scale with t_end in minutes - infeasible on the current simulator), or (b) non-metabolic signals: protein-complex-assembly failure, protein count collapse over longer windows, translation rate.
MCC_v1 (0.160) is lower than MCC_v0 (0.333) because the larger balanced sample exposes the recall floor. v0's 0.333 was n=4 noise.
